settings.editor: We unite volunteers to clean rivers and inspire action for a greener world.

settings.title: Wateree is more than an organization — it’s a growing movement of river rescuers, community volunteers, and people creating lasting environmental change.

settings.editor: Volunteers joined this year to rescue rivers, protect and fight pollution in the earth.
